engineIntelligence.h2: Fiat Tipo Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Fiat Tipo in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Fiat Tipo 955A8000 engine - diesel 1.6L replacement UK
productionHistory: Easy, Lounge and S-Design trim levels - 2016-2021
knownFailures: EGR valve clogging - carbon buildup restricts flow causing power loss and warning lights on urban-driven examples.
DPF regeneration failure - short journeys prevent full burn cycles leading to blockages and reduced performance.
Turbocharger wear - variable geometry vanes stick or fail after 80k+ miles on high-mileage commuter vehicles.

cards.altText: Fiat Tipo 199A8000 engine - petrol 1.4L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing belt wear - interference design requires replacement every 5 years or 60k miles to prevent valve damage.
Oil consumption increase - piston ring wear on higher-mileage units leads to top-ups between services.
Ignition coil failure - misfires and rough idle common after 70k miles on city-driven examples.

cards.altText: Fiat Tipo 55263739 engine - petrol 1.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: Turbocharger oil feed restriction - clogged feed pipes cause premature turbo failure on neglected units.
High-pressure fuel pump wear - rough cold starts and power loss reported after 60k miles.
Timing chain tensioner noise - rattling on startup indicates wear requiring inspection before failure.

commonProblems.h2: Fiat Tipo Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Fiat Tipo's engine range is generally reliable with proper maintenance, but the 1.6L Multijet diesel and 1.4L Fire petrol dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost breakdowns below to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your Tipo.

problems.h4: EGR Valve Clogging - Why Fiat Tipo Diesel Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Tipo Easy, Lounge, S-Design, Estate, Saloon (2016-2021, 955A8000 & 199A7000 Multijet II)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation valves accumulate carbon deposits from urban stop-start driving, restricting flow and triggering fault codes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace EGR valve; reset fault codes; road test
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught early; may recur if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt Multijet engine with upgraded EGR components, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine has other wear; eliminates recurrence risk

problems.recommendation: If your Tipo has under 70k miles and the EGR is the only fault, cleaning or replacement offers good value. On higher-mileage examples with additional wear signs, a rebuilt engine with upgraded EGR components provides longer-term peace of mind at a comparable total cost.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 955A8000 engine prices for your Fiat Tipo

problems.h4: DPF Regeneration Failure - When Diesel Particulate Filters Block
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Tipo Easy, Lounge, S-Design, Estate, Saloon (2016-2021, 955A8000 & 199A7000 Multijet II)
problems.rootCause: Short urban journeys prevent the DPF reaching temperatures needed for automatic regeneration, causing soot accumulation and eventual blockage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Off-vehicle cleaning or forced regeneration cycle; sensor checks; ECU reset
repairOptions.longevity: Works if filter not physically damaged; driving pattern must change

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt Multijet engine with new or cleaned DPF system, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if DPF is cracked or engine shows other wear signs

problems.recommendation: Attempt cleaning or forced regeneration first if the DPF is intact and the engine is otherwise healthy. If the filter is physically damaged or the engine has high mileage with other issues, replacement with a rebuilt unit offers better long-term value and eliminates the risk of repeat blockages.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Tipo Multijet DPF replacement

problems.h4: Timing Belt Failure Risk - Protecting Fiat Tipo Interference Engines
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Tipo Pop, Easy, Easy Plus (2016-2021, 199A8000 1.4L Fire petrol; 199A7000 1.3L Multijet diesel)
problems.rootCause: Timing belts degrade with age and mileage; if they snap on these interference engines, valves collide with pistons causing catastrophic damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing belt, tensioner, idlers and water pump; reset service indicator
repairOptions.longevity: Essential preventative maintenance; prevents catastrophic failure if done on schedule

repairOptions.tier: Major - Valve Repair After Belt Snap
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Cylinder head removal, valve replacement, guides, seals; reassembly and testing
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if block/pistons undamaged; costly and still leaves aged engine

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt engine with new belt kit installed, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if belt has snapped; eliminates all age-related wear in one solution

problems.recommendation: Never skip the timing belt interval - it's the cheapest insurance against engine destruction. If the belt has already snapped, a rebuilt engine is usually more cost-effective than attempting valve repairs on an already high-mileage block.
problems.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo timing belt replacement vs rebuilt engine costs

problems.h4: Turbocharger Wear - Restoring Power to High-Mileage Tipo Diesels
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Tipo Easy, Lounge, S-Design, Estate, Saloon (2016-2021, 955A8000 1.6L Multijet II)
problems.rootCause: Variable geometry turbo vanes accumulate carbon or suffer bearing wear from oil starvation, causing power loss, whistle noises or limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove old turbo, fit refurbished or new unit, replace oil feed lines, reset adaptations
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if engine otherwise healthy; ensure oil system is clean to protect new turbo

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt Multijet engine with new or upgraded turbo, full gasket set, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine shows other wear; eliminates risk of turbo-related oil contamination

problems.recommendation: If your Tipo's engine is otherwise healthy with good compression and oil consumption, a turbo replacement offers good value. If the engine has high mileage with additional concerns, a rebuilt engine with upgraded turbo components provides comprehensive peace of mind.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Tipo 955A8000 turbo replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Fiat Tipo
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're facing EGR issues, DPF warnings, timing belt concerns or turbo wear, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Fiat Tipo specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Fiat Tipo Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Fiat Tipo and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Fiat Tipo Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Fiat Tipo in the UK is listed below with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Fiat Tipo 1.3L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.3L Multijet II was the Tipo's entry-level diesel, prioritising fuel economy and low running costs for budget-conscious buyers. Found primarily in Pop and early Easy trims, it delivered adequate performance for urban and mixed driving while maintaining strong MPG figures.
commonFailurePoints: Timing belt wear on interference design; EGR cooler leaks on high-mileage urban examples
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Tipo 1.3L diesel engines

items.title: Fiat Tipo 1.6L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.6L Multijet II became the Tipo's most popular diesel, balancing strong torque for family hauling with reasonable fuel economy. Available across Easy, Lounge and S-Design trims in all body styles, it dominated UK sales and now drives the majority of replacement enquiries.
commonFailurePoints: EGR valve clogging; DPF regeneration failure on short-journey vehicles; turbo VGT wear after 80k miles
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Tipo 1.6L diesel engines

items.title: Fiat Tipo 1.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.0L FireFly Turbo represented Fiat's modern downsizing strategy, offering turbocharged performance with reduced emissions for Euro 6d compliance. Introduced in 2019 for Hatchback variants, it targets urban drivers prioritising efficiency without sacrificing drivability.
commonFailurePoints: Turbo oil feed restriction; high-pressure fuel pump wear; timing chain tensioner noise on startup
items.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo 1.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Fiat Tipo 1.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The naturally aspirated 1.4L Fire engine provided simple, reliable motoring for entry-level Tipo buyers. Available across Pop, Easy and Lounge trims in Hatchback and Saloon forms, it remains a popular choice for low-mileage drivers avoiding diesel complexity.
commonFailurePoints: Timing belt wear on interference design; oil consumption increase on high-mileage units; ignition coil failure after 70k miles
items.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo 1.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Fiat Tipo 1.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.6L E.torQ offered extra power for drivers wanting more flexibility without diesel running costs. Less common than the 1.4L Fire, it appeared in Easy and Lounge trims, providing stronger acceleration for motorway-heavy use cases.
commonFailurePoints: Oil pump wear on high-mileage units; thermostat housing leaks; camshaft position sensor failure causing no-start issues
items.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo 1.6L petrol engine prices

Timing belt discipline critical on all interference engines to prevent catastrophic failure

faq.h2: Fiat Tipo Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Fiat Tipo engine replacement cost?
items.answer: Fiat Tipo engine replacement costs typically range from £1,400 to £3,500 for a rebuilt unit supply-only, depending on engine code and variant. The 1.4L Fire petrol is generally cheapest, while the 1.0L FireFly Turbo commands a premium due to turbo components.
keyPoints: 1.4L Fire petrol rebuilt: £1,400-£2,800 supply only
1.6L Multijet diesel rebuilt: £1,600-£3,200 supply only
1.0L FireFly Turbo rebuilt: £1,800-£3,500 supply only
Supply & fit labour adds £450-£950 depending on garage location
items.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo engine replacement prices now

items.question: What engine codes fit the Fiat Tipo?
items.answer: The Fiat Tipo uses five main engine codes: 199A8000 (1.4L petrol), 199A9000 (1.6L petrol), 55263739 (1.0L turbo petrol), 199A7000 (1.3L diesel) and 955A8000 (1.6L diesel). Always verify your exact code via registration check before ordering.
keyPoints: Diesel codes: 199A7000, 955A8000
Body style (Hatchback/Saloon/Estate) affects fitment compatibility
Enter your reg above for instant code verification
items.cta: Check your Fiat Tipo engine code compatibility instantly

items.question: Is a reconditioned Tipo engine reliable for family use?
items.answer: Yes, reconditioned Fiat Tipo engines from vetted UK specialists are reliable for family use when sourced through a marketplace like EngineMarket that enforces quality standards and warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Reconditioned units have worn parts replaced to restore performance
Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard through EngineMarket
Specialists upgrade known weak points like EGR valves during rebuild
Compression and leak-down testing before dispatch ensures quality
items.cta: Get quotes for reconditioned Fiat Tipo engines with warranty

items.question: How long does Tipo engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only engine delivery typically takes 2-5 working days from UK specialists. Full supply & fit service, including booking, delivery and installation, usually completes within 7-10 working days depending on garage availability.
keyPoints: Supply-only: 2-5 days dispatch from specialist warehouse
Supply & fit: 7-10 days total including garage booking
Express options sometimes available for urgent replacements
Post-installation diagnostics and road test included in fit service
items.cta: Find Fiat Tipo engine supply & fit availability in your area

items.question: Do I need ECU reprogramming for Tipo engine swap?
items.answer: Most Fiat Tipo engine swaps require immobiliser matching and basic ECU adaptation, but not full reprogramming if the replacement engine shares the same code. Specialists handle this as part of supply & fit service.
keyPoints: Same-code replacements need immobiliser sync, not full ECU flash
Different-code swaps may require additional adaptation work
Supply & fit specialists include necessary electronics work in quote
Always confirm ECU compatibility before ordering replacement engine
items.cta: Enquire about Fiat Tipo ECU compatibility with your replacement engine

items.question: Will a replacement Tipo engine pass MOT?
items.answer: Yes, a properly installed replacement Fiat Tipo engine will pass MOT provided emissions systems are functional and no warning lights remain. Rebuilt engines from EngineMarket specialists include components designed to meet emissions compliance.
keyPoints: Replacement engines include functional EGR/DPF where required
No dashboard warning lights must remain post-installation
Exhaust emissions must meet original specification for year
Supply & fit service includes post-installation MOT readiness check
items.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo engine quotes with MOT compliance guarantee

items.question: Can I fit a Tipo engine myself to save money?
items.answer: While technically possible for experienced DIY mechanics, Fiat Tipo engine replacement requires specialist tools, ECU adaptation equipment and chassis knowledge. Most owners save time and risk by using vetted supply & fit specialists.
keyPoints: Tipo chassis codes 356/357 require specific lifting and support points
ECU immobiliser matching needs diagnostic equipment most DIYers lack
Incorrect installation can void warranty and cause secondary damage
Supply & fit quotes often include warranty on both parts and labour
items.cta: Get professional Fiat Tipo engine fitting quotes from UK garages

items.question: What warranty comes with Tipo replacement engines?
items.answer: Replacement Fiat Tipo engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty as standard, with some specialists offering extended coverage options for an additional fee.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Some specialists offer 24-month options at premium pricing
Always confirm exact terms and claim process before ordering
items.cta: Compare Fiat Tipo engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: How do I know which Tipo engine I need?
items.answer: The fastest way to identify your exact Fiat Tipo engine is to enter your registration number in our checker above, which pulls DVLA data to confirm engine code, fuel type, displacement and compatible replacement options instantly.
keyPoints: Registration check confirms engine code, variant and body style
Engine code is stamped on block and in V5C registration document
Fuel type and displacement visible on vehicle badge and documentation
Our compatibility tool cross-references code with available replacements
items.cta: Identify your Fiat Tipo engine code instantly with reg check

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Tipo engine vs buying another car?
items.answer: For Fiat Tipo models under 10 years old with good bodywork and service history, engine replacement at £1,400-£3,500 often offers better value than purchasing a comparable used vehicle, especially when factoring in warranty coverage.
keyPoints: Rebuilt engine cost typically 30-50% of comparable used Tipo value
12-month warranty on replacement engine vs limited used car warranty
Retain known service history and avoid unknown previous ownership
Supply & fit service minimises downtime versus car shopping process
items.cta: Calculate Fiat Tipo repair vs replace value with our comparison tool
